title: eupatorium conyzoides
intro: Eupatorium conyzoides, also known as the Dog Fennel or False Pennyroyal, is a plant species native to tropical and subtropical regions worldwide. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. Eupatorium conyzoides has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its health benefits in reducing inflammation and improving immune function. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various ailments.
